g.text: Please use CSS style instead of skinparam padding
pgauthzd (reader) — the front door; AuthZEN + native API; answers direct (decision-only) or consults OPA (OPA_URL set)
pgauthzd (writer) — full profile; verifies the writer role, applies the write to the primary
OPA — opt-in Rego policy sidecar; ONLY pgauthzd calls it
